Package io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.response

package io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.response
Contains all the response classes. 包含设备响应的实体类的xml bean
Author:
luna
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity
    SIP协议交互模型 一般一端发起的模型，另一端需要xml解析
